x-module-descriptions.Accessibility:
The `Accessibility` module provides access to the user/device settings for closed captioning and voice guidance.

Apps **SHOULD** attempt o respect these settings, rather than manage and persist seprate settings, which would be different per-app.
x-module-descriptions.Advertising: A module for platform provided advertising settings and functionality.
x-module-descriptions.Device: A module for querying about the device and it's capabilities.
x-module-descriptions.Discovery:
Your App likely wants to integrate with the Platform's discovery capabilities. For example to add a "Watch Next" tile that links to your app from the platform's home screen.

Getting access to this information requires to connect to lower level APIs made available by the platform. Since implementations differ between operators and platforms, the Firebolt SDK offers a Discovery module, that exposes a generic, agnostic interface to the developer.

Under the hood, an underlaying transport layer will then take care of calling the right APIs for the actual platform implementation that your App is running on.

The Discovery plugin is used to _send_ information to the Platform.

### Localization
Apps should provide all user-facing strings in the device's language, as specified by the Firebolt `Localization.language` property.

Apps should provide prices in the same currency presented in the app. If multiple currencies are supported in the app, the app should provide prices in the user's current default currency.
x-module-descriptions.Display: A module for querying about the display
x-module-descriptions.Lifecycle2: Methods and events for responding to Lifecycle changes in your app.
x-module-descriptions.Localization: Methods for accessing location and language preferences.
x-module-descriptions.Stats: Provides methods to retrieve application-level system information.
x-module-descriptions.TextToSpeech: A module for controlling and accessing Text To Speech over Firebolt.

methods.name: Discovery.watched
methods.summary: Notify the platform that content was partially or completely watched

params.name: entityId
params.summary: The entity Id of the watched content.

params.name: progress
params.summary: How much of the content has been watched (percentage as (0-0.999) for VOD, number of seconds for live)

params.name: completed
params.summary: Whether or not this viewing is considered "complete," per the app's definition thereof

params.name: watchedOn
params.summary: Date/Time the content was watched, ISO 8601 Date/Time

params.name: agePolicy
params.description: The age policy associated with the watch event. The age policy describes the age groups to which content may be directed.

result.name: success
result.summary: whether the call was successful or not

examples.name: Notify the platform of watched content
Notify the platform that child-directed content was watched

methods.name: Display.edid
methods.summary: Returns the EDID (and extensions) of the connected or integral display, as a Base64 encoded string

result.name: Base64 EDID
result.summary: The EDID (and extensions) of the connected or integral display, as a Base64 encoded string

methods.name: Display.size
methods.summary: Returns the physical dimensions of the connected or integral display, in centimeters. Returns 0, 0 on a OTT/STB device when a display is not connected over HDMI

width.description: The width of the display in centimeters

height.description: The height of the display in centimeters

methods.name: Display.maxResolution
methods.summary: Returns the physical/native resolution of the connected or integral display, in pixels. Returns 0, 0 on a OTT/STB device when a display is not connected over HDMI

width.description: The width of the display in pixels

height.description: The height of the display in pixels

methods.name: Metrics.startContent
methods.summary: Inform the platform that your user has started content.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

examples.name: Send startContent metric and notify the platform that the content is child-directed

methods.name: Metrics.error
methods.summary: Inform the platform of an error that has occurred in your app.

params.name: type
params.summary: The type of error

params.name: code
params.summary: an app-specific error code

params.name: description
params.summary: A short description of the error

params.summary: Whether or not this error was visible to the user.

params.name: parameters
params.summary: Optional additional parameters to be logged with the error

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

params.summary: The entityId of the media.

params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

params.summary: The entityId of the media.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

methods.name: Metrics.mediaSeeking
methods.summary: Called when a seek is initiated during media playback.

params.name: entityId
params.summary: The entityId of the media.

params.name: target
params.summary: Target destination of the seek, as a decimal percentage (0-0.999) for content with a known duration, or an integer number of seconds (0-86400) for content with an unknown duration.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

methods.name: Metrics.mediaSeeked
methods.summary: Called when a seek is completed during media playback.

params.name: entityId
params.summary: The entityId of the media.

params.name: position
params.summary: Resulting position of the seek operation, as a decimal percentage (0-0.999) for content with a known duration, or an integer number of seconds (0-86400) for content with an unknown duration.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

methods.name: Metrics.mediaRateChanged

params.summary: The entityId of the media.

params.name: agePolicy

methods.name: Metrics.mediaRenditionChanged

params.name: width

params.name: height

params.name: profile
params.summary: A description of the new profile, e.g. 'HDR' etc.

params.name: agePolicy
params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

methods.name: Metrics.mediaEnded

params.summary: The age policy to associate with the metrics event. The age policy describes the age group to which content is directed.

methods.name: TextToSpeech.speak
methods.summary: Speak the utterance immediately. Any ongoing speech is interrupted.
methods.description: Text argument is either plain text or a well-formed SSML document TTS_status, not success attribute, to be used by caller to indicate success of call 0 OK, 1 Fail, 2 not enabled, 3 invalid configuration Raises onSpeechinterrupted if speaking is interrupted

params.name: text
params.summary: String to be converted to Audio for speech

params.name: text
params.value: I am a text waiting for speech.

methods.name: TextToSpeech.pause
methods.summary: Pauses the speech for given speech id
methods.description: Pauses the utterance. Raises onSpeechpause if ongoing speech is paused. Does nothing if utterance is already paused

params.name: speechid
params.summary: Identifier for the speech call

methods.name: TextToSpeech.resume
methods.summary: Resumes the speech for given speech id
methods.description: Continue the paused utterance. Raises onSpeechresume if paused speech is resumed. Does nothing if the utterance is not paused

params.name: speechid
params.summary: Identifier for the speech call

methods.name: TextToSpeech.cancel
methods.summary: Cancels the speech for given speech id
methods.description: Stop speaking if utterance is currently being spoken. Raises onSpeechinterrupted if speaking was interrupted.

params.name: speechid
params.summary: Identifier for the speech call

params.name: speechid

methods.summary: Paused speech was resumed.

params.name: speechid

params.name: speechid
params.summary: Identifier for the speech call

methods.name: TextToSpeech.onSpeechinterrupted

params.name: speechid

params.name: speechid

result.name: listvoices

ifa_type.description: Source of the IFA as defined by IAB

lmt.description: Boolean that if set to 1, user has requested ad tracking and measurement is disabled

MediaPosition.title: MediaPosition
MediaPosition.description: Represents a position inside playback content, as a decimal percentage (0-0.999) for content with a known duration, or an integer number of seconds (0-86400) for content with an unknown duration.

Connected.description: Indicates whether the device currently has a usable network connection.

MemoryUsage.title: MemoryUsage
MemoryUsage.description: Describes current and maximum memory usage of the container.

userMemoryUsedKiB.description: User memory currently used in 1024 bytes.

userMemoryLimitKiB.description: Maximum user memory available in 1024 bytes.

gpuMemoryUsedKiB.description: GPU memory currently used in 1024 bytes.

gpuMemoryLimitKiB.description: Maximum GPU memory available in 1024 bytes.

ttsendpoint.description: URL for Text to Speech API

ttsendpointsecured.description: Secure URL for Text to Speech API

language.description: Language used by Text to speech

voice.description: Voice used by Text to speech

primvolduckpercent.description: Prime Volume duck percent for Text to speech

rate.description: Speech rate for Text to speech

enabled.description: Whether or not closed-captions should be enabled by default
Whether or not voice guidance should be enabled by default

rate.description: The rate at which voice guidance speech will be read back to the user

navigationHints.description: Whether or not voice guidance should include additional navigation hints

AgePolicy.title: AgePolicy
AgePolicy.description: The policy that describes various age groups to which content is directed. See distributor documentation for further details.
